hook.text: A company moves its on-premises Oracle database to the cloud. It sounds simple. It takes 18 months.

buildup.text: Database migration involves schema conversion, data transfer, application rewiring, and extensive testing.

discovery.text: AWS DMS and Azure DMS replicate data continuously, allowing near-zero downtime migrations.

twist.text: The hardest part isn't the data. It's the stored procedures, triggers, and vendor-specific SQL that don't translate.

climax.text: Successful migrations happen incrementally. Move one application at a time, validate, then move the next.

punchline.text: Database migration is a marathon. Sprint it and you'll crash.

quiz.question: What is the hardest part of cloud database migration?
options: Converting vendor-specific features like stored procedures and triggers
Choosing a cloud provider from the available options
Creating a new database schema from scratch
